---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature for GroktoDash
title: "feat: "
labels: ["type/feature"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the user need.

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## macOS Integration

How would this use Apple frameworks? Does it require new entitlements, new
extension targets, or changes to the sandbox?

## Dependency Impact

Does this require any new third-party dependencies? If yes, include the
dependency name, license, and justification (why Apple frameworks can't
solve this).

## Alternatives Considered

What workarounds exist today? Why aren't they sufficient?

## Additional Context

Sketches, mockups, references to similar features in other apps.
